scenario_analysis.draw_case: Draw case: becomes live if the first 30 minutes stay low-event and both sides protect transition space.
watch_triggers: confirmed starting XI differs from roster-depth baseline
late injury or suspension changes the strongest positional unit
market probability moves against the model by more than 8 percentage points

why_this_pick: Final model edge +19.0 points toward Netherlands 倾向不败或取胜.
what_would_change_the_pick: new injury/lineup evidence changes the strongest positional edge
fresh odds imply a different market favorite
post-match calibration shows this confidence bucket underperforming
blocked or partial evidence must be resolved before raising confidence

analysis_summary.storage_note: JSON report remains the audit artifact; SQLite is an optional query/index layer.
